pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 8: OUTPUT_FILE variable matches exact path
setup_task.sh line 93: ground truth IDs saved to exact path
task.json description explicitly specifies CSV columns; Legacy_Observations table contains patient_guid, note_date, note_text; LastName/FirstName from fchpat via patient_guid join

privileged_info_summary: The task mines unstructured clinical notes from a synthetic database. Setup injects 10 patients with notes into the Legacy_Observations table of DrTuxTest database. Ground truth consists of approximately 4 patients whose notes contain penicilline-related keywords (tested variations: 'Pénicilline' with accent, 'PENICILLINE' uppercase, 'penicilline' lowercase). All data is synthetically generated by setup_task.sh which selects random patients from fchpat and injects test notes. Expected output is a CSV to /home/ga/Documents/penicillin_safety_review.csv with columns: PatientGUID, LastName, FirstName, NoteDate, NoteText.
